name: qa-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin for comprehensive AI QA testing setup

scripts.test: node tests/scripts/detect-stack.test.js && node tests/scripts/analyze-tests.test.js && node tests/scripts/verify-setup.test.js
scripts.test:promptfoo: cd tests && (promptfoo eval -c skills/init.test.yaml --env-file ../.env || true) && (promptfoo eval -c skills/sync.test.yaml --env-file ../.env || true) && (promptfoo eval -c skills/coordinator.test.yaml --env-file ../.env || true)
